Structural approaches differ significantly with Agent_1 using basic DataFrame operations versus Agent_2's advanced Delta Lake architecture. Both outputs are syntactically correct with minor formatting issues in Agent_2.

The core intent of database conversion is shared, but Agent_2 addresses significantly more PostgreSQL features, suggesting different understanding of conversion requirements.

Agent_2 uses modular approach with distinct sections for table creation (lines 20-40), hierarchy building (lines 45-70), JSON processing (lines 85-95), window functions (lines 95-105), and trigger emulation (lines 105-135). Agent_1 uses basic DataFrame operations while Agent_2 leverages Delta Lake architecture with caching and optimization strategies.
